summary: Iteration 15 testing complete. All 24 new VO feature tests pass (100%). Verified GET /api/vo/profiles returns 3 profiles with correct specs, POST /api/vo/profile/{id} switches profiles correctly, GET /api/camera returns all new adaptive/hover fields. Frontend Camera panel shows profile badge, zone badge, and 2 stats rows (FAST/LK/ZONE/DRIFT/YAW). Settings tab shows VO Hardware Profile section with 3 clickable cards and Adaptive VO Status panel.

issues: Minor console warnings about chart dimensions - not blocking functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/vo/profiles returns 200 with list of 3 profiles
GET /api/vo/profiles - Pi Zero 2W (id=0) has correct specs: 320x240, FAST=30, LK=5, 100 features, 15fps
GET /api/vo/profiles - Pi 4 (id=1) has correct specs: 640x480, FAST=25, LK=7, 200 features, 30fps
GET /api/vo/profiles - Pi 5 (id=2) has correct specs: 800x600, FAST=20, LK=9, 300 features, 30fps
POST /api/vo/profile/0 returns success=true and profile_id=0
POST /api/vo/profile/1 returns success=true and profile_id=1
POST /api/vo/profile/2 returns success=true and profile_id=2
Profile change reflects in GET /api/camera active_profile and profile_name
GET /api/camera returns active_profile (int)
GET /api/camera returns profile_name (string: Pi Zero 2W/Pi 4/Pi 5)
GET /api/camera returns altitude_zone (int: 0-3 for LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRUISE)
GET /api/camera returns altitude_zone_name (string)
GET /api/camera returns adaptive_fast_thresh (float: 15-35)
GET /api/camera returns adaptive_lk_window (float: 3-15px)
GET /api/camera returns hover_detected (boolean)
GET /api/camera returns hover_duration (float >= 0)
GET /api/camera returns yaw_drift_rate (float)
GET /api/camera returns corrected_yaw (float)
Frontend Camera panel shows profile badge (Pi Zero 2W/Pi4/Pi5)
Frontend Camera panel shows altitude zone badge (LOW/MED/HIGH/CRUISE)
Frontend Camera panel row 1 shows DET, INL, CONF, DIST, ERR stats
Frontend Camera panel row 2 shows FAST, LK, ZONE, DRIFT, YAW stats
Frontend Settings tab shows VO Hardware Profile section with 3 profile cards
Frontend Settings tab shows Adaptive VO Status section with zone, fast threshold, LK window, hover status
Frontend clicking profile cards switches active profile
Frontend HOVER badge conditionally renders when hover_detected=true
critical_code_review_comments: simulator.py _update_camera() correctly implements altitude-adaptive VO params: LOW (<10m), MEDIUM (10-50m), HIGH (50-200m), CRUISE (>200m)
simulator.py hover detection requires 30 consecutive ticks of low motion (<0.5px) in HOVER/ARMED mode
native_bridge.py provides setdefault() for all new fields ensuring backwards compatibility with C++ module
CameraPanel.js correctly displays 2 stats rows with proper color coding for zone badges
SettingsTab.js correctly fetches /api/vo/profiles on mount and tracks active profile from camera data

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components render and interact correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all new Visual Odometry features for 5km RTL flight: 1) Hardware Profiles - 3 profiles (Pi Zero 2W/Pi 4/Pi 5) with different resolutions and VO parameters accessible via GET /api/vo/profiles and switchable via POST /api/vo/profile/{id}. 2) Altitude-Adaptive Parameters - VO settings (FAST threshold, LK window) change based on barometric altitude across 4 zones (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRUISE). 3) Hover Yaw Correction - detects hovering and provides yaw_drift_rate and corrected_yaw fields. Camera panel shows profile badge, zone badge, and HOVER badge (when detected). Settings tab has VO Hardware Profile section with clickable cards and Adaptive VO Status panel. WebSocket telemetry includes all new camera fields. Total 24 new tests pass plus existing 81 tests from previous iterations.

hardware_profiles_api.returns: Array of 3 profiles with id, name, type, width, height, fast_threshold, lk_window, lk_iterations, max_features, focal_length, target_fps

camera_new_fields: active_profile - Currently selected hardware profile ID (0/1/2)
adaptive_fast_thresh - Current FAST threshold (adapts to altitude)
adaptive_lk_window - Current LK window size (adapts to altitude)
yaw_drift_rate - Gyroscopic drift rate in rad/s

settings_tab_sections.vo_hardware_profile: 3 clickable profile cards showing name, resolution, FAST, LK, max_features, focal_length
settings_tab_sections.adaptive_vo_status: Shows altitude zone, FAST threshold, LK window, profile name, hover detected status, hover duration, yaw drift, corrected yaw
